hero.headline:
Real Skills. Real Jobs.
Real Dignity.
hero.subtext: SGSS empowers school dropouts and graduates with employment-oriented skills, placing them in sustainable jobs to break the cycle of poverty.

whatWeDo.title: What We Do
whatWeDo.subtitle: We bridge the gap between education and employment through targeted skill development.

cards.title: Train
cards.description: Converting potential into professional capability. We equip dropouts and graduates with industry-ready technical skills.

cards.title: Place
cards.description: Skills mean nothing without opportunity. We actively place beneficiaries into stable jobs, ensuring financial independence.

cards.title: Empower
cards.description: Building stronger communities. We fund women entrepreneurs and modernize government schools to create lasting generational change.

impact.title: Our Impact & Partners
impact.subtitle: Delivering proven results through long-term collaborations with industry leaders.

cards.title: Education Initiatives
cards.subtitle: ITU Foundation
cards.description: Building the foundation for future generations through holistic school adoption.

whyThisMatters.title: Why This Matters
paragraphs: Charity is temporary, but dignity is permanent. By focusing on employment, we provide families with a steady income, not just a one-time handout.
Whether it's a dropout finding a career or a woman starting her own business, every success story ripples through the entire community.

donations.title: Donate to the Cause
donations.subtitle: Donations to SGSS Trust are exempt from Income Tax under Section 80G.
donations.gatewayIntegrationText: (User to Confirm: Razorpay / Stripe details goes here)

tiers.impact: Sponsors one month of skill training materials for a student.
Provides a complete smart classroom kit for a rural school.
Funds a small business grant for a woman entrepreneur.

partners.title: Partner With Us
partners.subtitle: A trusted, compliant implementation partner for Corporate Social Responsibility (CSR).
partners.introText: SGSS Trust is a registered charitable trust serving the community with education, digital literacy, and empowerment programs.

features.title: Full-Cycle Implementation
bullets: End-to-End Execution: We handle planning, mobilization, training, and placement.
Targeted Impact: Programs tailored for Youth, Women, or School Development.
Transparent Reporting: Regular updates with photos, data, and beneficiary stories.

features.title: Ease of Partnership
bullets: Dedicated Point of Contact: Single manager for your project.
Custom Branding: Co-branded certificates and event banners.
Compliance First: All documentation and audits handled professionally.
